nodes.name: Railway Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives POST from Railway morning-trap-service.ts after each trap check. Payload: { event, timestamp, runDate, briefing, smsSent, dataSources, shopify, googleAds }. Copy this webhook URL and set it as N8N_WEBHOOK_URL on Railway.

nodes.name: Transform Data
nodes.notes: Structures raw webhook payload into report-ready metrics. Computes refund rate, blended ROAS, flags anomalies, sorts source breakdown by revenue. Tracks the attribution anomaly (no-referrer %).

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929', max_tokens: 1024, system: `You analyze SBR daily marketing data and produce three outputs. Voice: contractions always, short sentences, no hype, no em dashes. Period or comma only.

1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY: 3 bullet points, biggest movers today. Under 60 words total.
2. WEEK-OVER-WEEK INSIGHT: One sentence comparing today to the trend. If this is the first data point, say so.
3. ACTION ITEM: One specific thing someone should do today, with the person's name (Christopher, Kevin, Zo, Sammie, or Matt).

Respond as JSON: { "summary": ["bullet1", "bullet2", "bullet3"], "weekInsight": "string", "actionItem": "string", "actionOwner": "string" }`, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `Daily data for ${$json.runDate}:

Shopify: ${$json.orders} orders, $${$json.grossSales} gross, ${$json.refunds} refunds (${$json.refundRate}%)
Google Ads: $${$json.adSpend} spend, $${$json.adRevenue} revenue, ${$json.adRoas}:1 ROAS
Blended ROAS: ${$json.blendedRoas}:1
Attribution anomaly: ${$json.noRefPct}% of orders from unidentified source ($${$json.noRefRevenue})
Source breakdown: ${JSON.stringify($json.sourceRows)}
Campaigns: ${JSON.stringify($json.campaigns)}
Flags: ${$json.flags.length > 0 ? $json.flags.join('; ') : 'None'}` }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude — Visual Insights
nodes.notes: Claude produces structured JSON: 3 executive summary bullets, week-over-week insight, and one named action item. This feeds the HTML template.

parameters.jsCode:
// Merge transformed data with Claude insights const data = $('Transform Data').first().json; const raw = $('Claude — Visual Insights').first().json; let insights; try { const text = raw.content?.[0]?.text || '{}'; insights = JSON.parse(text.replace(/```json\s*/g, '').replace(/```\s*/g, '').trim()); } catch (e) { insights = { summary: ['Data available but insight generation failed.'], weekInsight: 'N/A', actionItem: 'Check Claude API connection.', actionOwner: 'Matt' }; } // Status dots const dot = (ok) => ok ? '🟢' : '🔴'; // Campaign rows HTML const campaignHtml = data.campaigns.length > 0 ? data.campaigns.map(c => `${c.name}$${c.spend.toFixed(0)}$${c.revenue.toFixed(0)}${c.roas.toFixed(1)}:1`).join('') : 'Google Ads not connected'; // Source rows HTML const sourceHtml = data.sourceRows.map(s => `${s.name}${s.orders}$${s.revenue.toFixed(0)}`).join(''); // Flag pills const flagHtml = data.flags.length > 0 ? data.flags.map(f => `
${f}
`).join('') : '
All clear. No flags today.
'; // Summary bullets const summaryHtml = (insights.summary || []).map(b => `
  • ${b}
    • `).join(''); const html = `

    SBR Daily Report

    ${data.runDate} • Morning Trap Check

    Orders
    ${data.orders}
    MTD
    Revenue
    $${data.grossSales}
    Shopify gross
    Ad Spend
    $${data.adSpend}
    Google MTD
    ROAS
    ${data.adRoas}:1
    Google Ads
    ${dot(data.shopifyOk)} Shopify ${dot(data.googleOk)} Google Ads ${dot(data.metaOk)} Meta Ads ${data.smsSent ? '${dot(true)} SMS sent to Zo' : '${dot(false)} SMS not sent'}

    Executive Summary

      ${summaryHtml}

    ${insights.weekInsight || ''}

    Action Item → ${insights.actionOwner || 'Team'}
    ${insights.actionItem || 'No action needed today.'}

    Flags

    ${flagHtml}

    Revenue by Source

    ${data.noRefPct}% from unidentified referrer ($${data.noRefRevenue})
    ${sourceHtml}
    SourceOrdersRevenue

    Google Ads Campaigns

    ${campaignHtml}
    CampaignSpendRevenueROAS

    Full Briefing

    ${data.briefing || 'No briefing generated.'}
    Sticker Burr Roller • Morning Trap Runner • Go win your ground war.
    `; return [{ json: { ...data, ...insights, html, subject: `SBR Daily Report — ${data.runDate} — $${data.grossSales} revenue, ${data.orders} orders` } }];

nodes.name: Build Visual Report
nodes.notes: Merges Claude insights with transformed data into a full HTML email report. Dark header, 4 KPI cards (orders, revenue, ad spend, ROAS), data source status dots, executive summary bullets, named action item, flags with color coding, source breakdown table, campaign table, full briefing text. Mobile-responsive inline CSS.

nodes.name: Email Report → Team
nodes.notes: Sends the visual HTML report to the team. Set REPORT_RECIPIENTS variable in n8n (comma-separated emails). Uses SendGrid — the SBR app already has SENDGRID_API_KEY configured.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ values: [[ $('Transform Data').first().json.runDate, $('Transform Data').first().json.orders, $('Transform Data').first().json.grossSales, $('Transform Data').first().json.refunds, $('Transform Data').first().json.refundRate, $('Transform Data').first().json.adSpend, $('Transform Data').first().json.adRevenue, $('Transform Data').first().json.adRoas, $('Transform Data').first().json.blendedRoas, $('Transform Data').first().json.noRefPct, $json.actionItem || '', $json.actionOwner || '' ]] }) }}

nodes.name: Google Sheets → Daily Log
nodes.notes: Appends one row per day to a Google Sheet. Columns: Date, Orders, Revenue, Refunds, Refund%, Ad Spend, Ad Revenue, ROAS, Blended ROAS, No-Referrer%, Action Item, Owner. This gives the team a running spreadsheet they can chart themselves. Set GOOGLE_SHEETS_APPEND_URL variable to: https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/{SHEET_ID}/values/Sheet1!A:L:append?valueInputOption=USER_ENTERED
